Card Text: Deal 6 damage.
Upgraded Text: Deal 9 damage.
Notes: Starting card x5. Remove when possible.

Card Text: Gain 5 Block.
Upgraded Text: Gain 8 Block.
Notes: Starting card x4. Remove when possible.

Card Text: Gain 8 Block. Discard a card.
Upgraded Text: Gain 11 Block. Discard a card.
Notes: Starting card. Enables discard synergies from turn 1.

Card Text: Deal 3 damage. Apply 1 Weak.
Upgraded Text: Deal 4 damage. Apply 2 Weak.
Notes: Starting card. Zero-cost weak application. Upgrade often.

Card Text: Sly. Draw 2 cards.
Upgraded Text: Sly. Draw 3 cards.
Notes: Top discard payoff. Zero-cost when discarded. Works with Prepared/Acro. Counts as card play for Pinpoint.

Card Text: Gain 1 energy. Draw 2 cards. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Gain 2 energy. Draw 2 cards. Exhaust.
Notes: Free acceleration. Helps line up combos. Top rare.

Card Text: Draw 3 cards. Discard 1 card.
Upgraded Text: Draw 4 cards. Discard 1 card.
Notes: Best card in class. Enables entire discard package. Triggers Sly cards. Always pick.

Card Text: Discard your hand. Draw that many cards. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Discard your hand. Draw that many cards. Retain. Exhaust.
Notes: Dig through entire deck. Triggers all Sly. Upgrade gives Retain but not critical.

Card Text: At the end of your turn, Retain up to 1 card.
Upgraded Text: At the end of your turn, Retain up to 2 cards.
Notes: Lines up all combos. Hold Gamble/Acro for perfect turns. Best consistency tool.

Card Text: Draw 1 card. Discard 1 card.
Upgraded Text: Draw 2 cards. Discard 2 cards.
Notes: Bridge card into discard archetype. Discounts Pinpoint for free. Upgrade is disgusting.

Card Text: At the start of your turn, draw 1 card and discard 1 card.
Upgraded Text: Costs 0. At the start of your turn, draw 1 card and discard 1 card.
Notes: Permanent Sly trigger. Draw consistency. Upgrades to 0 energy.

Card Text: Gain 2 Intangible. At the end of your turn, lose 1 Dexterity.
Upgraded Text: Gain 3 Intangible. At the end of your turn, lose 1 Dexterity.
Notes: Ancient exclusive. Game-winning. 3 turns invincible. Downside rarely matters. Always upgrade.

Card Text: Deal 11 damage. Apply 3 Weak.
Upgraded Text: Deal 14 damage. Apply 3 Weak.
Notes: Neutralize upgrade via Ancient. 3 Weak is gross. Always applies turn 1.

Card Text: Deal 17 damage. Costs 1 less for each Skill played this turn.
Upgraded Text: Deal 22 damage. Costs 1 less for each Skill played this turn.
Notes: Gross damage. Often costs 0 with Acro. Loopable. Solves damage for entire run.

Card Text: Deal 10 damage. If Fatal, gain an additional card reward this turn. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Deal 12 damage. If Fatal, gain an additional card reward this turn. Exhaust.
Notes: Double card rewards. Helps find combo pieces. Gross with polarized card pool.

Card Text: ALL enemies lose 6 Strength this turn. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: ALL enemies lose 8 Strength this turn. Exhaust.
Notes: Still common for some reason. Full blocks AoE fights. Disgusting.

Card Text: Unplayable. If this card is discarded, gain 1 energy.
Upgraded Text: Unplayable. If this card is discarded, gain 2 energy.
Notes: Discard payoff. Less needed with Sly cheating energy. Works best with Acro.

Card Text: Gain 2 Dexterity.
Upgraded Text: Gain 3 Dexterity.
Notes: Stops chip damage. One copy often enough. Doesn't need upgrade.

Card Text: Apply 2 Weak. Gain 11 Block.
Upgraded Text: Apply 3 Weak. Gain 14 Block.
Notes: Best weak source. Never take damage in hallways. Weak is broken.

Card Text: Whenever you draw a card this turn, apply 3 Poison to ALL enemies.
Upgraded Text: Whenever you draw a card this turn, apply 4 Poison to ALL enemies.
Notes: NOT Sly (must play it). 1 energy then draw = massive AoE poison. Play before Acrobatics. Great with draw-heavy decks.

Card Text: At the end of your turn, apply 2 Poison to ALL enemies.
Upgraded Text: At the end of your turn, apply 3 Poison to ALL enemies.
Notes: Gets out of deck as power. Boss scaling. AoE. Needs upgrade. One of few good poison cards.

Card Text: Enemy loses X Strength. Apply X Weak. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Enemy loses X Strength. Apply X+1 Weak. Exhaust.
Notes: Weaker than Spire 1 (no heart-like enemies). Still solid weak source.

Card Text: Whenever you play a card, gain 1 Block.
Upgraded Text: Whenever you play a card, gain 2 Block.
Notes: Less needed now. Block solved by going infinite turn 1. Still good output.

Card Text: You cannot draw additional cards this turn. Cards cost 0 this turn.
Upgraded Text: Cards cost 0 this turn.
Notes: Energy cheat. Less payoffs than Spire 1 (no Snecko/Pyramid often). Situational.

Card Text: Remove all Artifact and Block from the enemy. Apply 2 Vulnerable. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Remove all Artifact and Block from the enemy. Apply 3 Vulnerable. Exhaust.
Notes: Zero-cost vuln. Terror replacement. Helps kill turn 1. Block removal utility.

Card Text: Deal 13 damage. Deal 2 less damage for each other card in your hand.
Upgraded Text: Deal 17 damage. Deal 2 less damage for each other card in your hand.
Notes: Works with Prepared/Acro. Often deals full 13. Early game damage. Falls off later.

Card Text: Deal 9 damage. Discard 1 card.
Upgraded Text: Deal 12 damage. Discard 1 card.
Notes: Discard enabler with damage. Less needed than Spire 1. Better options exist.

Card Text: Sly. Gain 9 Block.
Upgraded Text: Sly. Gain 12 Block.
Notes: Zero-cost 9 block when discarded. Even 2-for-9 isn't bad. Doesn't require redraw. Disgusting.

Card Text: Sly. Deal 7 damage to ALL enemies.
Upgraded Text: Sly. Deal 9 damage to ALL enemies.
Notes: Usually costs 0. Early game AoE. Loopable. Solid discard payoff.

Card Text: Sly. Deal 3 damage to a random enemy 4 times.
Upgraded Text: Sly. Deal 4 damage to a random enemy 4 times.
Notes: Zero-cost 12 damage. Lack of targeting hurts. Worse Flick-Flack but still decent.

Card Text: Sly. Gain 1 Dexterity. Gain 4 Thorns.
Upgraded Text: Sly. Gain 2 Dexterity. Gain 4 Thorns.
Notes: Free power when discarded. 1 Dex breakpoint meaningful. Good vs multi-hit.

Card Text: Whenever you draw a card, deal 2 damage to a random enemy.
Upgraded Text: Whenever you draw a card, deal 3 damage to a random enemy.
Notes: Discard payoff. AoE scaling in boss fights. Doesn't trigger on start of turn draw.

Card Text: Deal 5 damage for each Skill in your hand.
Upgraded Text: Deal 7 damage for each Skill in your hand.
Notes: Much better than Spire 1. With Acro/Prepared, often 15-21 damage for 1.

Card Text: Sly. Apply 4 Poison to ALL enemies.
Upgraded Text: Sly. Apply 6 Poison to ALL enemies.
Notes: Comparable to Flick-Flack. Better late game payoff. AoE poison. Loopable.

Card Text: Gain 10 Block. Deal 10 damage.
Upgraded Text: Gain 13 Block. Deal 13 damage.
Notes: Early game card. Chunky numbers. Doesn't enable anything. Gets you through Act 1.

Card Text: Gain 5 Block. Draw 2 cards.
Upgraded Text: Gain 8 Block. Draw 2 cards.
Notes: Not as good as it looks. Rather have discard attached. Can brick Pillage-style turns.

Card Text: Innate. Deal 11 damage. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Innate. Deal 15 damage. Exhaust.
Notes: Great Act 1 frontload. Falls off. Extra brick less punishing than Spire 1.

Card Text: Deal 12 damage. Strips Artifact. Apply 2 Vulnerable. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Deal 15 damage. Strips Artifact. Apply 2 Vulnerable. Exhaust.
Notes: Giga-backstab. Great early. Being rare hurts (competes with better rares).

Card Text: Block is not removed at the start of your next turn.
Upgraded Text: Block is not removed at the start of your next turn.
Notes: Less blocking with Dex in this game. Good with boat relics. Less wraith form setups.

Card Text: Deal 15 damage. Draw 2 cards next turn.
Upgraded Text: Deal 20 damage. Draw 2 cards next turn.
Notes: Big damage common. Draw next turn decent. 2 energy hurts. Less needed with better options.

Card Text: Whenever you play a Skill, it gains Sly.
Upgraded Text: Costs 1. Whenever you play a Skill, it gains Sly.
Notes: Win more card. Insane when working. Hard to play early. Situational.

Card Text: Can only be played if there are no cards in your Draw Pile. Deal 50 damage.
Upgraded Text: Can only be played if there are no cards in your Draw Pile. Deal 60 damage.
Notes: Easier to play with small decks. Still finicky. Decent win condition for discard.

Card Text: This turn, your next Skill is played twice.
Upgraded Text: This turn, your next 2 Skills are played twice.
Notes: Less payoffs than Spire 1. No apps/catalyst common. Situational now.

Card Text: Choose a card in your hand. Add 3 copies of it into your hand next turn. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Choose a card in your hand. Add 3 copies of it into your hand next turn. Exhaust.
Notes: What are you nightmaring? Less good targets. Energy hard to find. Calc Gamble exhausts.

Card Text: Shivs deal 4 additional damage.
Upgraded Text: Shivs deal 6 additional damage.
Notes: Only good with Shiv cards. Blade Dance exhausting hurts. Draw order dependent.

Card Text: Add 3 Shivs into your hand. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Add 4 Shivs into your hand. Exhaust.
Notes: Now exhausts but Shivs go to exhaust for Knife Trap anyway! Still good Shiv generation. 12-16 damage for 1 energy.

Card Text: Draw 1 card. If it's a Skill, gain 3 Block.
Upgraded Text: Draw 1 card. If it's a Skill, gain 6 Block.
Notes: Free block often. No Gremlin Nob. Works with After Image.

Card Text: Deal 4 damage to ALL enemies twice.
Upgraded Text: Deal 6 damage to ALL enemies twice.
Notes: AoE more important in Spire 2. Worse than Flick-Flack. Pickable Act 1.

Card Text: Deal 6 damage to ALL enemies. If last card was a Skill, apply 1 Weak to ALL.
Upgraded Text: Deal 8 damage to ALL enemies. If last card was a Skill, apply 1 Weak to ALL.
Notes: Weak all is fine. AoE damage meh. Skill condition trivial.

Card Text: Discard 2 cards. Add 2 Shivs into your hand.
Upgraded Text: Discard 2 cards. Add 3 Shivs into your hand.
Notes: 0-cost Shiv generator! Discards statuses enemies inflict. Sly synergy. Great in Shiv or Sly builds.

Card Text: Apply 3 Poison to a random enemy 3 times.
Upgraded Text: Apply 3 Poison to a random enemy 4 times.
Notes: Boss damage if desperate. No Catalyst. Poison bad in general.

Card Text: Deal 8 damage. Apply 1 Weak.
Upgraded Text: Deal 11 damage. Apply 1 Weak.
Notes: Weak is good. Start with Neutralize. Less needed.

Card Text: Gain 6 Block. Add 1 Shiv to your hand.
Upgraded Text: Gain 9 Block. Add 2 Shivs to your hand.
Notes: Block + Shivs. Take early even without Shiv commitment. Passive defense while generating Shivs for Knife Trap.

Card Text: Deal 8 damage. Whenever you play a card this turn, enemy loses 2 HP.
Upgraded Text: Deal 10 damage. Whenever you play a card this turn, enemy loses 3 HP.
Notes: Choke replacement. Shivs bad, so less useful. Desperation damage.

Card Text: Apply 5 Poison.
Upgraded Text: Apply 7 Poison.
Notes: Simple reliable poison. With Accelerant+, 7 poison = 18 damage (7+6+5). Clone enchantment makes this insane.

Card Text: At the start of your turn, add a Shiv into your hand.
Upgraded Text: At the start of your turn, add 2 Shivs into your hand.
Notes: Best Shiv enabler ironically. Slow. Works with Phantom Blade. Not needed usually.

Card Text: Weak enemies take double damage from Attacks.
Upgraded Text: Costs 1. Weak enemies take double damage from Attacks.
Notes: Double damage is wrath. 2 energy hurts. Needs upgrade. Often infinite anyway.

Card Text: Deal 6 damage. Apply 3 Poison.
Upgraded Text: Deal 8 damage. Apply 4 Poison.
Notes: Just numbers. 12 damage equivalent. Fine early.

Card Text: Deal 5 damage.
Upgraded Text: Deal 8 damage.
Notes: Zero cost damage. Sly cards better (don't need to redraw). Less good than Spire 1.

Card Text: Deal 11 damage. Add 1 Shiv to your hand.
Upgraded Text: Deal 14 damage. Add 1 Shiv to your hand.
Notes: Damage common. One shiv not enough for accuracy.

Card Text: Gain 3 Dexterity this turn.
Upgraded Text: Gain 5 Dexterity this turn.
Notes: Temporary Dex. Rather draw combo pieces. Energy cheat but meh.

Card Text: Add 3 Shivs into your hand. Reduce this card's cost by 1.
Upgraded Text: Add 4 Shivs into your hand. Reduce this card's cost by 1.
Notes: Blade Dance that DOESN'T exhaust! Cost goes 2→1→0. Infinite Shivs in long fights. Excellent with Knife Trap.

Card Text: Gain 7 Block. Add Sly to a Skill in your hand this turn.
Upgraded Text: Gain 10 Block. Add Sly to a Skill in your hand this turn.
Notes: Situational energy cheat. What expensive skills do you have? Probably underrated.

Card Text: Deal 4 damage to ALL enemies. Add 4 Shivs into your hand.
Upgraded Text: Deal 4 damage to ALL enemies. Add 4 Shivs into your hand. Exhaust.
Notes: 16 AoE for 2 that exhausts. Fine. No Shiv synergies usually.

Card Text: Deal 8 damage. Deals 4 additional damage for each card discarded this turn.
Upgraded Text: Deal 10 damage. Deals 5 additional damage for each card discarded this turn.
Notes: Discard payoff without Sly. 1 energy cost hurts. Better payoffs exist.

Card Text: Gain Block equal to Poison on ALL enemies. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Gain Block equal to Poison on ALL enemies. Exhaust.
Notes: Need poison setup. Twisted Funnel only. Very niche.

Card Text: Deal 6 damage for each Attack played this turn.
Upgraded Text: Deal 8 damage for each Attack played this turn.
Notes: Early Shiv payoff before you find Knife Trap. +6 damage per Shiv. Chunks elites. Falls off vs bosses.

Card Text: Deal 12 damage. The next Skill you play costs 0.
Upgraded Text: Deal 16 damage. The next Skill you play costs 0.
Notes: Most skills cost 1 or less already. Basically 1-for-12. Fine. Awkward.

Card Text: Whenever an Attack deals unblocked damage, apply 1 Poison.
Upgraded Text: Whenever an Attack deals unblocked damage, apply 2 Poison.
Notes: Works with Shivs for poison stacking. 2 energy is clunky. Don't use with Accelerant (small poisons burn off too fast).

Card Text: Deal 7 damage X times.
Upgraded Text: Deal 10 damage X times.
Notes: Energy at premium. No ChemX often. Niche with enchantments.

Card Text: Gain 4 Block.
Upgraded Text: Gain 7 Block.
Notes: Worse than Spire 1. Better things exist. At least free.

Card Text: Gain 4 Block. Next turn, gain 4 Block.
Upgraded Text: Gain 6 Block. Next turn, gain 6 Block.
Notes: Blocking with Dex less common. 1 energy brick.

Card Text: Draw cards until you have 6 cards in hand.
Upgraded Text: Draw cards until you have 7 cards in hand.
Notes: Clunky. Wants upgrade. Not attached to discard. Can enable infinite sometimes.

Card Text: Play every Shiv in your Exhaust pile against the enemy.
Upgraded Text: Play every Shiv in your Exhaust pile against the enemy. Shiv becomes Shiv+.
Notes: NEW SHIV CORE. Plays ALL Shivs from exhaust = massive burst. Upgrade gives Shiv+ damage. Boss melter. Won more runs with this alone than with Accuracy alone.

Card Text: Poison ticks 1 additional time.
Upgraded Text: Poison ticks 2 additional times. Costs 1.
Notes: THE KEY POISON CARD. Makes 10 poison deal 27 damage (10+9+8). Upgrade ASAP. Changes entire archetype.

Card Text: Deal 5 damage. If enemy is Poisoned, deal 5 damage again.
Upgraded Text: Deal 7 damage. If enemy is Poisoned, deal 7 damage again.
Notes: Great with Noxious Fumes or Twisted Funnel. Adds massive damage to poison builds. Don't take too early without poison source.

Card Text: Gain 2 Strength per attack this turn. Gain 4 Block.
Upgraded Text: Gain 3 Strength per attack this turn. Gain 6 Block.
Notes: #2 Shiv support card. Stacks Strength fast with Shivs (2→4→6→8...). Great with Knife Trap burst turn.

Card Text: Every 3 times you apply Poison, deal 11 damage to ALL enemies.
Upgraded Text: Every 3 times you apply Poison, deal 14 damage to ALL enemies.
Notes: Meant for Envenom Shivs. Clunky. Poison bad. Every 3 is too slow.

Card Text: Shivs gain Retain. First Shiv each turn deals 9 additional damage.
Upgraded Text: Shivs gain Retain. First Shiv each turn deals 12 additional damage.
Notes: Once-a-turn Accuracy. Strange. Works with Infinite Blades. Niche.

Card Text: Whenever you play a card, deal 4 damage to a random enemy.
Upgraded Text: Whenever you play a card, deal 6 damage to a random enemy.
Notes: 3 energy too much. Just worse Speedster. Shivs bad anyway.

Card Text: Discard your hand. Next turn, Attacks deal double damage.
Upgraded Text: Discard your hand. Next turn, Attacks deal double damage.
Notes: Unload + Phantasmal Killer. Throws away Well-Laid Plans. Gamble on next draw. Bad.

Card Text: Double your Block gain this turn.
Upgraded Text: Double your Block gain this turn. Costs 0.
Notes: Need to block more than 5 to be worth it. How often? Combo card for nothing.

Card Text: Discard your hand. Add a Shiv for each card discarded.
Upgraded Text: Discard your hand. Add a Shiv for each card discarded. Costs 1.
Notes: Terrible. Ruins Well-Laid Plans. Ruins Retain. Shivs bad.

Card Text: Deal 6 damage to ALL enemies. Deal 6 damage to ALL enemies.
Upgraded Text: Deal 8 damage to ALL enemies. Deal 8 damage to ALL enemies.
Notes: Being rare hurts. Just damage. Fine early, never see it early.

Card Text: Deal 1 damage. Deal 1 additional damage for each card drawn this combat.
Upgraded Text: Deal 1 damage. Deal 1 additional damage for each card drawn this combat.
Notes: 3 energy brick. If drawing lots, you're infinite already. Never want turn 1.

Card Text: Apply 10 Poison. Retain.
Upgraded Text: Apply 10 Poison. Retain.
Notes: Retain is valuable for timing. 10 poison with Accelerant+ = 27 burst. Don't take more than 1. Upgrade recommended.

Card Text: The enemy takes double damage from other players this turn.
Notes: NEW - needs evaluation

Card Text: Whenever another player attacks an enemy, gain 1 [gold]Block[/gold].
Notes: NEW - Sly keyword, likely good
